---
title: "Customer Uplift Modeling"
description: "Built and compared uplift models to support targeted marketing decisions."
categories: [Python, Machine Learning, Marketing Analytics]
image: proj2.png
---

## Overview

This project focuses on uplift modeling for targeted marketing. The goal is to identify which customers are most likely to respond positively to treatment and to optimize targeting strategies.

## What I did

- Cleaned and prepared treatment and control group data
- Built and compared multiple uplift models
- Evaluated performance across logistic, neural network, random forest, and XGBoost approaches
- Interpreted model outputs for business decision-making

## Tools

Python, polars, pyrsm, scikit-learn, plotnine, Jupyter Notebook

## Notebook

[View Analysis Notebook](https://nbviewer.org/github/rsm-jih204/Customer-analysis/blob/main/uplift.ipynb)

## GitHub

[View Repository](https://github.com/rsm-jih204/Customer-analysis)
